text:
🔭 Agentic AI minimal stack (Gusto: Cloudflare Workers + Vercel AI SDK)

Gusto's Cofounder product (launched Jun 2 2026) runs its entire agent loop on Cloudflare Workers + Vercel AI SDK — no custom orchestration platform. Memory and artifacts as simple DB columns or in-house bits. Built by 4 engineers + 1 designer in 9–10 weeks. Source: Eddie Kim (CTO) on Lenny's Newsletter.

Key points:
• Vercel AI SDK's generateText/maxSteps handles the agent loop natively — no custom loop code (Fact / vendor primary)
• Cloudflare + Vercel AI SDK is an officially documented integration; main friction is process.env vs CF environment bindings (Fact / vendor primary)
• Cloudflare formalized the pattern in Agents Week (Apr–Jun 2026): Agents SDK on Durable Objects with built-in SQLite per agent (Fact / vendor primary)
• Broader practitioner consensus: teams abandoning LangChain for Vercel AI SDK's simpler tool loop (Practitioner consensus)

For SoftServe: clean reference architecture for S-tier "prove AI value" POC engagements and the AI-use-case pod definition (due week of Jun 29).
